name: Standardize Inngest function structure
description: 30 of 63 Inngest functions lack the `// @inngest-admin: <scope>` access-classification comment that admin operators use to safely re-run or cancel functions. Additionally, 3 functions use throwing .parse() instead of .safeParse() (tracked separately as WI-1063) and some cron functions lack explicit `retries:` config. The @inngest-admin annotation is a lightweight forward-only guard introduced on the first batch of functions but never extended to the newer half of the codebase.
acceptanceCriteria: Current state: 20 functions annotated, 30 missing (verified via `grep -rL '@inngest-admin' apps/api/src/inngest/functions/*.ts | grep -v test`). Missing sites include: account-deletion.ts, account-security-notification.ts, archive-cleanup.ts, ask-classification-observe.ts, ask-gate-observe.ts, auto-file-session.ts, billing-alias-merge.ts, billing-trial-subscription-failed.ts, challenge-round-finalize-failed.ts, email-bounced-observe.ts, exchange-empty-reply-fallback.ts, feedback-delivery-failed.ts, filing-observe.ts, freeform-filing.ts, graduation-narration.ts, needs-deepening-expire-pending.ts, notification-suppressed-observe.ts, notify-parent-child-cap-hit.ts, orphan-persist-failed.ts, payment-failed-observe.ts, review-calibration-grade.ts, session-completed.ts, session-completed-observe.ts, session-stale-cleanup.ts, streak-record.ts, subject-auto-archive.ts, summary-reconciliation-observe.ts, supportership-revocation.ts, topup-expiry-reminder.ts, topup-expiry-reminder-send.ts. Annotation values: 'parent-chain' (queries scoped by event.data.profileId), 'event-profile' (profileId from event, handler re-validates), 'cross-profile' (admin/cron, no profile scope), 'no-db' (pure notification/observe). Target: add `// @inngest-admin: <scope>` as the first line of each missing file; verify existing annotations are accurate. Approach: review each function's db access pattern (profileId-in-WHERE vs cross-profile scan vs no-db) and assign scope; use existing annotated functions as reference. Verification: CI lint (or a new `scripts/check-inngest-admin.ts` guard) should pass; grepping for missing annotations returns zero hits.
riskImpact: Ops reliability: operators re-running or force-canceling functions without knowing their scope can corrupt profile-owned data or silently double-process cross-profile jobs.
